title: melicytus micranthus
intro: Melicytus micranthus, also known as the dwarf daphne or small daphne, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Melicytus micranthus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Melicytus micranthus can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as a tincture, tea, or cream, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
